metadata.description: Marketplace for the cl-plugin-structure plugin — comprehensive reference for building plugins, skills, slash commands, hooks, MCP servers, and channels for Claude Code and Cowork, with deep token-optimization research and current-model-line guidance (Opus 4.8 / Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5).

plugins.name: cl-plugin-structure
plugins.description: Use when creating, scaffolding, structuring, or validating plugins for Claude Code or Claude Cowork. Covers the .claude-plugin/plugin.json + marketplace manifest, component organization (agents, skills, slash commands, hooks, MCP/LSP servers, channels), agent/command/hook frontmatter, the .local.md per-project settings pattern, portable paths, surface compatibility, bundled validator scripts, the Folder Architecture routing-table pattern (CLAUDE.md → workspace rooms → on-demand skills), the current Claude model line (Opus 4.8 / Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5) with effort levels and ultrathink, and the full development workflow.
plugins.author: TheDigitalGriot
